description: Jarvis capability manifest — only ops Jarvis can fully execute end-to-end today.

ops.name: lookup
ops.description: Look up a user's current tier, credits, quota, and account status

ops.name: quota_grant
ops.description: Grant generative credits or change a user's subscription tier
ops.example: give user@example.com 500 credits on creator tier for 90 days

ops.name: create_account
ops.description: Create a new HeyGen account, optionally with a comped subscription
ops.example: create account for new@example.com on pro tier for 30 days

ops.name: bulk_grant
ops.description: Grant credits or tier to a batch of up to 100 users at once
ops.example: bulk grant creator tier + 200 credits to: a@x.com, b@x.com, c@x.com

coming_soon.name: ent_sub_grant
coming_soon.description: Enterprise subscription grant with AE attribution and multi-seat support
